title: The AI Arms Race Comes Home: How Meta, Microsoft and Washington Are Redrawing the Rules
standfirst: The latest wave of announcements from Meta, Microsoft and the White House points to a turning point in the global technology economy: artificial intelligence is no longer merely a product race, but a struggle over power, data, labour and industrial policy. Beneath the language of innovation lies a harsher reality for workers, investors and governments alike: the costs are rising, the risks are widening, and the winners are trying to lock in advantage before regulators can catch up.
